symptom_summary: SRC002 suite remains fully blocked after final runtime rerun, driven by incomplete IMPL, missing UI authority, and non-freeze-ready TESTSETs.
problem_description: A batch rerun of IMPL-SRC-002-001 through IMPL-SRC-002-006 with the final calibrated impl-spec-test runtime produced 6/6 block verdicts. The dominant blockers are missing recovery handling and missing implementation unit mapping snapshots across all six IMPL packages. Repeated high-priority gaps include missing or non-freeze-ready UI/TESTSET authorities, incomplete TESTSET observation of declared completion states, and weak API output/precondition observability. Unlike SRC001, the rerun does not primarily indicate runtime false positives; it indicates that SRC002 SSOTs are still in an older shape that is incomplete for deep implementation-readiness review.
upstream_refs: ssot/impl/SRC-002/IMPL-SRC-002-005__训练前检查与训练后反馈能力-implementation-task-package.md
